text.title: Implementation Plan Authoring Checklist
text.summary: Phase-by-phase checklist for creating an implementation plan from approved design.md through stakeholder approval.

list.item: Read constitution.md — principles and standards
Read spec.md — extract all FR-X IDs
Read design.md — extract all AD-X and the full file change table (CREATE/MODIFY)
Review features/done/ — identify patterns from completed implementations
List every file from design.md file change table
Estimate tokens per file: LOC + dependencies + business logic + test coverage
Flag any single file estimate > 60k for decomposition (total task must be < 100k)
Group related files into logical work units (high cohesion, low coupling)
For each file/task, identify Finish-to-Start dependencies
Check for implicit dependencies: shared file modifications, module imports, schema order
Run tsort validation — detect cycles before writing wave analysis
Document why each dependency exists (not just which tasks depend on which)
Group Wave 1: all tasks with no dependencies
Group Wave 2+: tasks where all dependencies are in earlier waves
Define checkpoint action for each wave boundary
Mark critical path through the dependency graph
For each task: wave, complexity, token estimate, description (2-3 sentences)
For each task: traces to AD-X and FR-X
For each task: depends-on list and blocks list (consistent with dependency graph)
For each task: acceptance criteria (verifiable conditions)
For each task: files to create/modify (exact paths from design.md)
Apply INVEST: Independent, Negotiable, Valuable, Estimable, Small, Testable
All AD-X from design.md mapped to at least one task
All FR-X from spec.md covered by at least one task
All tasks have token estimate < 100k
Dependency graph has no cycles (tsort validates)
All tasks have verifiable acceptance criteria
Testing strategy covers all layers (unit, integration, E2E)
Risk assessment: all High impact risks have mitigations
Rollout: pre-deployment checklist and rollback plan defined
